title: Module 1
content:
ARM Cortex-M Microcontroller:
Introduction to the architecture, Programmer’s model, Behavior of the
application program status register (APSR), Memory system, Exceptions and
interrupts, System control block (SCB), Debug, Reset and reset sequence.

title: Module 2
content:
ARM Cortex-M Instruction Set:
Understanding the assembly language syntax, Use of a suffix in instructions,
Unified assembly language (UAL), Instruction set, Barrel shifter, Accessing
special instructions and special registers in programming.

title: Module 3
content:
Embedded System Components:
Embedded Systems vs. General Computing Systems, Classification of
Embedded Systems, Major Application Areas of Embedded Systems,
Purpose of Embedded Systems, Core of the Embedded System, Memory,
Sensors and Actuators, Communication Interface, Embedded Firmware,
Other System Components.

title: Module 4
content:
Embedded System Design Concepts:
Characteristics of an Embedded System, Quality Attributes of Embedded
Systems, Application-Specific Embedded System, Domain Specific
Examples of Embedded System, Fundamental Issues in Hardware Software
Co-Design, Computational Models in Embedded Design, Embedded
Firmware
Design
Approaches,
Embedded
Firmware
Development
Languages.
